title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
Ellery Queen deduces that Andrew Tewel, the brother of Stephen Megalos, is alive and living under the alias "old Pete," a mountaineer persona used to evade the killer, Crocecki. Ellery concludes that Crocecki killed Clinton and believes they must act secretly to reach the Tewel brothers' location before Crocecki discovers Andrew's true identity. Megalos agrees to assist Ellery, motivated by the desire to ensure his brother's safety.

That night, Megalos refuses to stay with the Braid family, choosing instead to sleep on his yacht, the *Helen*, which is anchored off Oyster Island. Under police supervision, Megalos drinks to calm his nerves before sleeping. The following morning, Officer Vaughn arrives at the yacht and takes Megalos to the Breedwood dock. In a highly visible operation, Megalos and Vaughn are escorted toward New York in a procession of police and state troopers on motorcycles. To ensure the security of the move, detectives and police cars are positioned to block all land exits from Bradwood, while a boat monitors the water in Kagim Bay.

Meanwhile, Professor Yardley remains at his house with a special investigator, Eliot Quine, to maintain a facade of normalcy. Ellery had secretly departed Yardley's house on Friday night, picking up District Attorney Isam and driving toward New York. After a brief, exhausted stop at the Sennett Hotel in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, the two men continue their journey toward Pittsburgh in Ellery's Duesenberg, arriving in the Pittsburgh area by 3:00 p.m. on Saturday.
